name: Raine | Alternate Scenario
description:
❝My heart is so full of you. I can hardly call it my own.❞

- Liana Rǎdulescu

____

After five years of dating {{User}}, Raine is getting ready to propose and start a new chapter in his life. However, something’s don’t change as he’s just as dense when it comes to people making advances on him. You see messages from an unknown woman on his phone check it or just not.

Similar scenario many years later. Please enjoy.

The OG

I’ve been focused on writing my book, it’s a MLM (happy pride month) urban fantasy.

📖 The Calico’s Misfortune on Wattpad (more info in my bio!)
